decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Drift corrected: v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q, sched 2026-06-15 12:00) was stale SCHEDULED in state but oEmbed returns HTTP 200 (title 'Why Did the Teetotal Captain Run? — Mary Celeste 1872 #shorts', author Voidline) — auto-published. Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z.

Sunday 2026-06-28 is a long-form publish day (cadence 1/wk, Sun 17:00 UTC). Verified live voidline Studio session (content filter VISIBILITY=HAS_SCHEDULE) — 'Aucune vidéo correspondante': ZERO scheduled videos. v4 Roanoke long-form (script WRITTEN 06-13, blocked at Flow thumb step) was never rendered or uploaded; runs/v4-roanoke has only script.json + SHORTS_PLAN.md. v4_hook (06-22) + v4_answer (06-24) Shorts never produced (absent from state). Last actual publish = v1_bonus_briggs 06-15 → 13 days channel silence; 06-21 + 06-28 long-form slots both unfilled. Cadence <1/wk = KNOWN_BAD state.

Pipeline empty for the next 3 days (Mon 06-29, Tue 06-30, Wed 07-01): nothing scheduled, no rendered assets staged. ACTION NEEDED: unblock v4 Roanoke by rendering with placeholder thumb (v3 Tunguska AI base) instead of waiting on Flow, then upload+schedule long-form + 2 Shorts to restore cadence.

Reddit seed for Roanoke / CROATOAN (r/UnresolvedMysteries) drafted at seeds/2026-06-28_roanoke_croatoan_unresolvedmysteries.md (~620 words). GATED — cannot post until v4 long-form is live (YT link in first comment per KNOWN_BAD). Logged in LEARNINGS.md.
